title: The Munch-Munch King Attacks
description: On pages 5–8, the munch-munch king attacks as the crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom.
scene: The Munch-Munch King Attacks. The crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey, hang tight to the helm up there! If anything happens to Nami, I'll have your heads for it!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Has my submersible ambush-ship "Tin can King" left you speechless!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: VIVI, I'll leave her with you for now!

summary: This part centers on the munch-munch king attacks, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
